title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: A discussion podcast covering multiple AI industry concerns including excessive token consumption growth, low shipment rates for token spend, valuation milestones for AI startups, and emerging AI trading applications. Topics span market inefficiencies, circular investment patterns, and privacy-ethics tradeoffs in AI services.
